project.title: Enigma-RealEstate-Title-Registry
project.scenario: Land-title / deed registry — tamper-evident deeds with transparent transfer and dispute revocation.

tasks.title: Plan Notary Registration
tasks.desc: Define roles, acceptance criteria and a sequence diagram for the Notary Registration slice.

tasks.title: Design Notary Registration
tasks.desc: Specify contracts/IssuerRegistry.sol — functions (registerNotary, deregisterNotary, transferRegistrar), events, errors, storage layout.

tasks.title: Code Notary Registration
tasks.desc: Implement registerNotary, deregisterNotary, transferRegistrar in contracts/IssuerRegistry.sol (clear the TODO(member1) markers).

tasks.title: Compile
tasks.desc: `forge build` is green including the Notary Registration slice.

tasks.title: Revise after review
tasks.desc: Address PR review feedback; refactor contracts/IssuerRegistry.sol and tests.

tasks.title: Deploy Notary Registration
tasks.desc: Deploy via script/Deploy.s.sol to Anvil (then Sepolia); record addresses in config.js.

tasks.title: Test Notary Registration
tasks.desc: `forge test --match-contract IssuerRegistryTest` passes; add edge-case + event tests.

tasks.title: Document Notary Registration
tasks.desc: Write docs/issuer-module.md and fill your README contribution row.

tasks.title: Present Notary Registration
tasks.desc: Record a demo video + slide deck and link them under Deliverables.
